product.name: Extra Durable Window Deflectors in-Channel Window Visors Rain Guards Fit for Kia Sportage 2023-2026, Sun Visors, Wind Vent for Shades, Exterior Car Accessories - 4 pcs. AG0860
features: ATTENTION!!! These high-quality automotive window rain guards CUSTOM FIT only for Kia Sportage 2023-2026.

Incredibly Durable AEROGUYS Auto Window Deflectors – They are made with strong and tough polycarbonate which is clear and scratch-resistant. They also provide UV protection making your ride more comfortable under all weather conditions.

Precisely Engineered – These window visors are designed and manufactured using very precise measurements and shaped with great care to ensure a perfect fit on your car windows providing you with maximum protection from rain, wind, and sun.

No Tools Needed, Quick and Easy Assembly – These rain guards are very easy to fit. IN-CHANNEL INSTALLATION provides perfect fit for your car. Just slip it onto your car’s window and your job is done within minutes. There is no drilling or no tools required. Be sure that AEROGUYS window deflectors are water resistant, sun protective and will not bend, break or crack regardless of the weather conditions.

Full-size Side Window Wind Deflectors – This is a set of 4 vent visors for the side windows of your vehicle. These automotive vent shades add more muscle to your car and a sleeker profile making it more aerodynamic. Make your vehicle more comfortable and add to its style at the same time with these durable visors.
